evals.prompt: Generate a @WebMvcTest for CountryController with GET /api/countries returning a list of CountryDTO objects. Use two DTO fixtures and assert the JSON response size and country names.
evals.expected_output: A controller test that uses MockMvc, mocks CountryService with @MockBean, and validates the returned JSON payload.

evals.prompt: Create MVC tests for InventoryController endpoint GET /api/inventory/changes that accepts changedDate and changedTime as request params and returns InventoryChangeDTO items.
evals.expected_output: A WebMvcTest class with descriptive test names and request parameter coverage for the date and time filters.
